initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Decompose the task into a set of focused subproblems that ensure every piece of input data is analyzed by a helper. Each helper should be assigned a specific part of the input to evaluate, and the synthesis brief must explain how to combine these individual evaluations into the final required format.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
